sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. קִצְפִּי.-

(1) twigs, splinters, so called from being broken off (see the root No. 1), Hos 10:7. LXX. φρύγανον.

(2) anger, Ecc 5:16 especially the anger of Jehovah, from the root No. 2, Jos 9:20 22:20 Isa 34:2 54:8 60:10 Zec 1:2 2Ch 19:10 altercation, strife, Est 1:18.

[“קְצַף Ch. anger, Ezr 7:23.”]
